Meet Your Agent

Born & raised in
Southern California.

Born and raised in Southern California, Martha doesn't just sell homes here — she understands the heartbeat of these communities. From Orange County to LA, Riverside to San Bernardino, she brings hyper-local insight, strategic expertise, and genuine care to every client relationship.

With years of experience guiding buyers and sellers through every type of market, Martha specializes in residential sales at every price point — from first homes to luxury estates. Her approach blends cutting-edge technology, next-generation marketing, and powerful negotiation strategies to deliver a smooth, strategic, and stress-free experience from start to finish.

Martha understands that buying or selling a home isn't just a transaction — it's a life milestone. It's about security, legacy, and building long-term wealth. She takes that responsibility seriously and works relentlessly to protect your equity, maximize your outcome, and help you make confident, informed decisions.

Fluent in Spanish — Sirvo y represento con orgullo a una comunidad diversa, asegurando que cada cliente se sienta escuchado, respetado y empoderado a lo largo de todo su proceso.

What Sets Martha Apart

High-Touch Communication Strategic Pricing Expert Negotiation Digital Marketing First-Time Buyers Luxury Estates Investment Properties Senior Real Estate (SRES) Relocation Probate Sales

South-facing 2-bed unit in the gated Leisure World 55+ community. Dual-pane windows, skylights, cut-down shower, private patio, and ocean breeze. Steps from carport. Community offers 9-hole golf, pool, gym, 200+ clubs and 24-hr security.

Client Voices

What Clients Say

Verified reviews from Zillow and Yelp. Martha's commitment to her clients speaks for itself.

Jessica R.
May 15, 2025 · Zillow
★★★★★
"Helped me rent a home."
Working with Martha Rangel was a great experience. I told her the cities I was interested in and what I needed in a home, and she delivered on everything. She was extremely responsive, professional, and efficient — thanks to her, I found the perfect home very quickly. She made the entire process smooth and stress-free. I would absolutely recommend Martha to anyone looking for a reliable and dedicated realtor.

"Sold a Single Family home in 2025 in Northeast Anaheim."
Her professionalism and expertise make Martha my top choice for potential clients. "First-time homebuyer — Thank you Martha!!"
